application_received.subject: New Application Received - {{jobTitle}}
application_received.body: A new application has been received for the position: {{jobTitle}}
application_received.cta: Please review the application in your dashboard

application_status.subject: Application Status Update - {{jobTitle}}
application_status.body: Your application status has been updated

interview_scheduled.subject: Interview Scheduled - {{jobTitle}}
interview_scheduled.body: An interview has been scheduled for the position: {{jobTitle}}

interview_reminder.subject: Interview Reminder - {{jobTitle}}
interview_reminder.body: This is a reminder that your interview is in {{timeUntil}}

interview_cancelled.subject: Interview Cancelled - {{jobTitle}}
interview_cancelled.body: The interview for {{jobTitle}} has been cancelled
